title: alyssum balkanicum f. elatum
intro: Alyssum balkanicum f. elatum, also known as Balkan alyssum, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its compact growth habit and fragrant, white blooms. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alyssum balkanicum f. elatum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to treat colds, bronchitis, and skin irritations.
